text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Oh darn! My takoyaki batter mix expires
tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I gotta eat it today... I learned my lesson last time
I ignored the date...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna go grab some octopus!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hold tight, batter! You're gonna be yummy
takoyaki before ya know it, so don't go bad while
I'm gone!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With her mind so focused on takoyaki, Tamamo
Cross ends up forgetting training altogether.
